data.body: WS7 (snappy-yew-strafe) LANDED: commit f0b736ce8. Shared stance preamble (_SHARED_PREAMBLE, G-12+FP-3c+R-6) injected at _resolve_system; bare-DO-NOT detector (test_reviewer_prompt_hygiene.py, non-vacuous, 0 offenders — corpus already R-6-clean); CONTRIBUTING.md §7. Completion-verifier failed first on AC3 'record both pass-rates' -> recorded ws7-affirmative-framing-baseline.md (git diff pre..post over reviewers+eval_specs is EMPTY; per-spec sha256+gold sizes identical). Closed w/ both attestations. 3/11 (WS1,WS6,WS7 = verifier-prompt chain done). Stack: WS1 4f20635dd->WS6 723f30f1c->WS7 f0b736ce8. Next: WS2 E4+hedge (criteria_routing group).
